data.name: LeVERB｜具有潜在视觉语言指令的人形全身控制
机器人训练机器人：人形机器人的自动现实世界策略适应与学习
基于多阶段强化学习的人形全身羽毛球运动
通过主动空间脑和可泛化动作小脑实现人形全身操作
在基于VR的人机协作模拟中探索基于GPT的大型语言模型实现可变自主性
世界动作模型：具身智能的下一个前沿
领域随机化在训练全身人形机器人控制扩散策略中的作用
扩散策略：通过动作扩散实现视觉运动策略学习
人形机器人操作接口（HuMI）：无需机器人演示的全身操作
用于人形策略学习的对抗性运动和运动模仿

data.description: Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids cites or references The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control.

The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation via Active Spatial Brain and Generalizable Action Cerebellum.
The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references LeVERB: Humanoid Whole-Body Control with Latent Vision-Language Instruction.
The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references Adversarial Locomotion and Motion Imitation for Humanoid Policy Learning.

Exploring a GPT-based Large Language Model for Variable Autonomy in a VR-based Human-Robot Teaming Simulation cites or references The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control.
The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references Diffusion Policy: Visuomotor Policy Learning via Action Diffusion.
领域随机化在训练全身人形机器人控制扩散策略中的作用使用域随机化。

The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references Humanoid Manipulation Interface (HuMI): Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation from Robot-Free Demonstrations.
The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI.
The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control evaluates or benchmarks HumanoidBench.
The Role of Domain Randomization in Training Diffusion Policies for Whole-Body Humanoid Control cites or references Humanoid Whole-Body Badminton via Multi-Stage Reinforcement Learning.
